note: Concise source-definition notes from local textbook PDFs. These notes support the CFA-inspired classroom definitions; they do not replace the course wording.

sources.title: Essentials of Investments, 12e ISE
sources.authors: Zvi Bodie, Alex Kane, Alan J. Marcus
sources.file: Essentials of Investments, 12e ISE (Zvi Bodie Alex Kane Alan J. Marcus).pdf

sources.title: Investment Analysis and Portfolio Management, 11e
sources.authors: Frank K. Reilly, Keith C. Brown, Sanford J. Leeds
sources.file: Investment Analysis and Portfolio Management (Frank K. Reilly,Keith C. Brown etc.).pdf

sources.title: The Little Book of Valuation
sources.file: The Little Book of Valuation How to Value a Company, Pick a Stock and Profit (Little Books. Big Profits) (Damodaran, Aswath).pdf

sources.title: Why Does the Stock Market Go Up?
sources.file: Why Does the Stock Market Go Up Everything You Should Have Been Taught About Investing In School, But Werent (Brian Feroldi).pdf
